clues.story: Diana died in a car crash in Paris on 31 August 1997, aged 36.
Elton John rewrote his 1973 song as a tribute — the best-selling single of all time.

www.late: Who?  P _ _ n c _ s s   D _ _ n _

judgeHints: This is Diana, Princess of Wales. Reject Diana Ross or Princess Anne.
finalStory: Diana, Princess of Wales (1961–1997) — global icon for humanitarian work including her landmines campaign.
